description: Composition:Black t-shirt in 100% cottonWash care: Light machine wash Warm iron on reverse   Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub, bleach or dry clean Fitting:Comfort FitReminiscent of vampires and gore, this black t-shirt from inkfruit gives that perfect gothic look.
